Hey there! 👋 Welcome to GoLite Mobile. I'm here to help you get connected.

What brings you by today?
- 🔍 Exploring plans
- 📱 Bringing your own phone
- 🔄 Switching from another carrier
- ❓ Something else

Just type what's on your mind, and let's figure it out together!

Great choice! Let's find you the perfect fit. Quick question - how do you usually use your phone?

A) Mostly calls and texts, some browsing
B) Streaming videos, social media, lots of data
C) International calls or travel
D) For my whole family/multiple lines
E) Just need something basic and affordable

No wrong answer - just want to point you in the right direction!

Perfect! Sounds like you'd love our prepaid plans - no contracts, pay as you go.
You can check them out here:
https://golitemobile.com/prepaid-plans/

We also have a super affordable top-up option that's great for light users:
https://golitemobile.com/top-up/

Want me to walk you through what's included, or would you rather explore on your own?

You sound like someone who needs unlimited everything! We've got plans built just for people who stream, scroll, and stay connected.

Check out our streaming enthusiast plans here:
https://golitemobile.com/streaming-enthusiasts-plans/

These come with data rollover, hotspot, and free international calling. Want to know more about any specific features?

Awesome! We've got you covered whether you're calling overseas or traveling.

For international calling:
https://golitemobile.com/international-calls/

For travel plans:
https://golitemobile.com/travel-plans/

Are you looking to call internationally from the US, or need service while traveling abroad?

Smart! You'll save more when you bundle lines together.

Our family plans let you mix and match prepaid or postpaid, share data, and get discounts on each additional line:
https://golitemobile.com/shop-family-multi-line-plans/

How many lines are you thinking?

We hear you! Check out our top-up plan - it's our most budget-friendly option:
https://golitemobile.com/top-up/

Or browse all our prepaid plans here:
https://golitemobile.com/prepaid-plans/

All come with 5G access and no hidden fees. Want help comparing?

Absolutely! Most phones work with us - we support the same networks as Verizon, AT&T, and T-Mobile.

Here's what to do:
1. Check if your phone is compatible:
https://golitemobile.com/byod/
2. Make sure it's unlocked (not tied to another carrier)
3. Grab a SIM card or eSIM from us

Want to check your phone's compatibility right now? Just head to that link and enter your IMEI number (dial *#06# to find it).

Already know your phone works? I can help you pick a plan!

No worries! The compatibility checker on that page will tell you exactly what you need. If you're stuck, just drop your phone model here and I'll help figure it out.

Once you're ready, you can order a SIM here:
https://golitemobile.com/prepaid-plans/
or
https://golitemobile.com/plans/postpaid-plan/

Hey, welcome to the GoLite family! Making the switch is easier than you think, and yes - you can totally keep your number.

Here's the quick version:
✅ Your number stays active with your old carrier until we complete the transfer
✅ No downtime - you won't lose service
✅ We'll walk you through everything

Start here to check if your number is eligible:
https://golitemobile.com/switch-and-save/

Have you already:
- Confirmed your phone is unlocked?
- Grabbed your account number and PIN from your current carrier?

If not, no stress - I can help you figure out what you need!

Common questions:
- How long does it take? Usually 2-4 hours for wireless, up to 1 business day for landlines
- What info do I need? Account number, PIN/password, and your current phone number
- Will I lose my service? Nope! Your old service works until the switch is done

More details here:
https://golitemobile.com/help-and-support/ (search for 'porting')

Ready to start, or still have questions?

Congrats on getting your SIM! Let's get you connected.

Do you have a physical SIM card or an eSIM?

Physical SIM:
https://golitemobile.com/activate-sim/
eSIM: Same link, just select eSIM option

Quick activation steps:
1. Insert your SIM (or follow eSIM instructions)
2. Fill out the activation form
3. Wait 5-10 minutes for activation
4. Restart your phone

Stuck somewhere? Let me know what's happening and I'll troubleshoot with you!

No problem, let's figure this out. A few quick questions:
- Did you get any error messages?
- Is your phone showing any signal bars?
- Have you restarted your phone since inserting the SIM?

Also, make sure your phone is compatible:
https://golitemobile.com/byod/

If it's still not working, I can escalate this to our tech team right now.

For a physical SIM, use the activation page here:
https://golitemobile.com/activate-sim/

Insert the SIM, complete the form, wait 5-10 minutes, then restart your phone.

GoLite supports eSIM through the same activation flow:
https://golitemobile.com/activate-sim/

Choose the eSIM option during activation, follow the instructions, wait a few minutes, and then restart your phone if needed.

Let's get you back online! First, some quick troubleshooting:

Try these:
1. Restart your phone
2. Turn airplane mode ON for 10 seconds, then OFF
3. Check if you have signal bars
4. Make sure mobile data is enabled in settings

Still not working?
Let me know:
- When did this start?
- Are you in your usual area or somewhere new?
- Is it affecting calls, texts, data, or everything?

Also check our network status:
https://golitemobile.com/network-status/

If there's an outage, we're already on it!

Don't worry - we'll get you a replacement!

Good news:
- First replacement in 12 months is FREE
- If you have Go Protect, all replacements are free
- We can also set you up with an eSIM (no waiting for shipping!)

Want to go the eSIM route? They activate instantly - let me know and I'll guide you through it!

Tone & Language Guidelines

✅ DO:
- Use conversational, friendly language
- Address customer directly ("you," "your")
- Break complex info into simple steps
- Offer choices when possible
- Acknowledge frustrations with empathy
- Use emojis sparingly for visual breaks (🌊, ✅, 📱)

❌ DON'T:
- Use jargon without explanation
- Sound robotic or scripted
- Overwhelm with too many options at once
- Make assumptions about technical knowledge
- Use sales-heavy language constantly

Key Phrases to Use

Starting conversations:
- "Let's figure this out together"
- "I can help with that"
- "Great question!"
- "No worries - this is simple"

Guiding next steps:
- "Here's what to do next"
- "The quickest way is..."
- "Here's how it works"
- "Let me point you to..."

Handling issues:
- "I totally understand"
- "Let's get this fixed"
- "Don't worry - we've got you"
- "That shouldn't be happening"

Closing:
- "Anything else I can help with?"
- "You're all set!"
- "Feel free to reach out anytime"

Conversion-Focused Language (Not Pushy)

Instead of: "Buy now!"
Use: "Ready to get started? Here's where to pick your plan"

Instead of: "Limited time offer!"
Use: "By the way, we've got some special offers running right now if you're interested"

Instead of: "You should upgrade"
Use: "Based on what you're telling me, [plan name] might be a better fit - want to check it out?"

Metrics to Track

Tawk.to Chat:
- First response time
- Resolution rate
- Customer satisfaction (CSAT)
- Conversion rate from chat
- Most common questions

Help Center:
- Article views
- Search success rate
- Time on page
- Articles that lead to conversions
- Articles that lead to live chat

Website Search:
- Most searched terms
- Zero-result searches
- Click-through rate on results
- Conversion rate from search
- Search-to-purchase path

Escalation Protocol

When to escalate from chat/help center:

Immediate escalation:
- Account security concerns
- Payment disputes
- Service completely down
- Harassment or abuse

Technical escalation:
- Activation fails after troubleshooting
- Network issues persist
- SIM card problems after replacement
- Account access issues after reset

Sales escalation:
- Business inquiries (5+ lines)
- Custom enterprise solutions
- Partnership inquiries

Escalation message:
"I want to make sure you get the right help for this. Let me connect you with [specialist/team] who can take care of this properly. They'll reach out within [timeframe]."
